title: pouteria hondurensis
intro: Pouteria hondurensis, also known as Honduran sapote, is a species of flowering plant in the family Sapotaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever and alleviating respiratory issues, due to its high content of saponins and other bioactive compounds. Herbal preparations of Pouteria hondurensis can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat various health conditions, including digestive issues and skin problems.
